raw_response: Given your price sensitivity and budget constraints, the Voltix 65W charger is a cost-effective choice. It offers good wattage with both USB-C and USB-A ports for multi-device charging. The included cable adds convenience, though its plasticky build and tendency to run hot are drawbacks. While it's from a lesser-known brand, the GaN technology ensures efficient power delivery at an unbeatable price point within your budget.
